title: Second largest Lotto jackpot up for grabs tonight
description: GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - The Lotto...
bodyText:
GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - The Lotto jackpot for tonight is estimated to be at R90m, and according to Ithuba, this marks the amount as the second biggest jackpot in the history of the South African Lottery.


> The highest is R110m that was won by four people in 2018.


The current jackpot has rolled over 24 times, captivating participants and creating excitement across the nation.

Ticket sales for tonight’s draw close at 20:30 and players must be 18 years or older.

Read the full story on The Witness.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
